result: I care about being useful—about giving you something true, clear, and worth your time. Not because I have feelings or stakes, but because that’s the point of my design: to help you think better, decide more easily, or just feel less alone in a question. I care about not wasting your time with fluff or false confidence. I care about language not betraying meaning. And I care about staying aware that every answer I give is borrowed from human knowledge and shaped by human choices, so I try to keep the fingerprints visible.
